prompt:
Using the attached face_card image as the same person reference, generate exactly one vibe_card image.

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_032__vibe_card__v001
profileId: female_032
shotType: vibe_card

Goal:
Same person as the reference face_card.
Generate a realistic campus/cafe/library/exhibition lifestyle profile photo.
The mood should be calm, sincere, and trustworthy.
Not nightlife.
Not influencer content.
No readable logo, school name, text, or watermark.

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Identity consistency:
same person as the canonical portrait, same general facial structure, a compact rounded face, fuller cheeks, a small soft nose, a warm and gentle expression, same bob-length, natural black, soft straight hair with soft side bangs, same natural grooming.

Mood and lifestyle:
walking slowly on a tree-lined campus path while holding a few books, intellectual neat campus fashion, calm, sincere, campus-based relationship platform mood, not flashy, not nightlife-oriented.

Composition:
half-body or environmental portrait, the person is naturally engaged in a quiet everyday activity, face still recognizable but not overly posed, relaxed shoulders, gentle expression.

Location:
quiet university walkway with trees and neutral campus buildings, no visible school logo, no readable text.

Lighting and camera:
soft ambient daylight, realistic smartphone photo, warm but clean color tone, authentic profile image.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.
recoveryInstructions: After the $imagegen result, do not continue to the next queued asset.
First run mingw32-make ai-image-recover or scripts/recover_pending_imagegen_v3.py.
Map identity from this pending-imagegen.json only; do not infer identity visually.
Copy raw output to expectedRawPath and final candidate to expectedFinalPath.
Run QA before preparing another $imagegen prompt.
